query:
SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN a.email LIKE '%@test.com' OR a.name LIKE '%Test%' OR a.name LIKE '%Teste%' THEN 'TESTE'
    ELSE 'REAL'
  END as tipo,
  COUNT(*) as qtd
FROM alunos a
LEFT JOIN (SELECT alunoId, COUNT(*) as ap_count FROM assessment_pdi GROUP BY alunoId) ap ON ap.alunoId = a.id
WHERE a.isActive = 1 AND (ap.ap_count IS NULL OR ap.ap_count = 0) AND a.consultorId IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY tipo;

SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN a.email LIKE '%@test.com' OR a.name LIKE '%Test%' OR a.name LIKE '%Teste%' THEN 'TESTE'
    ELSE 'REAL'
  END as tipo,
  COUNT(*) as qtd
FROM alunos a
LEFT JOIN (SELECT alunoId, COUNT(*) as ap_count FROM assessment_pdi GROUP BY alunoId) ap ON ap.alunoId = a.id
WHERE a.isActive = 1 AND (ap.ap_count IS NULL OR ap.ap_count = 0) AND a.consultorId IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY tipo;
